span.p:
Elastic Network Interface
- Public IP Assigned
- Security Group Attached

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Security Group
soc-lab-sg
────────────
Inbound Rules:
• SSH (22) → 0.0.0.0/0
• HTTP (80) → 0.0.0.0/0
────────────
Outbound: All traffic

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Key Pair
soc-lab-key
────────────
• RSA 2048-bit
• .pem format
• Private key only
